description_long: This is a modern beachfront bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees and flowering bushes. The structure features a flat roof and large windows, with a prominent entryway and a driveway leading up to the front. The property is bordered by a green lawn and a sandy beach area with several blue umbrellas and lounge chairs. Multiple cars are parked along the street and driveway, indicating residential use. The bungalow has a spacious, open layout with outdoor seating areas and a visible porch, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern beachfront bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a driveway, porch, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, porch, and several cars parked along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lawn, driveway, and the arrangement of cars and outdoor seating near the house.
description_view_2: Rear view facing the beach, with palm trees, umbrellas, and the back patio area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, side garden, and more of the surrounding landscape.
